message:
refactor(analysis): Replace inline type checks with trait functions (batch 6)

- builtin_calls.zig: Use container_traits (isDict, isList, isTuple, isSet),
  string_traits (isString) - 11 replacements
- method_calls.zig: Use type_traits.isFloating for obj_type == .float

Preserved specific type checks (.stringio, .list_iterator) and
payload access checks (arg_type.string != .literal).
